description: A taxpayer received Form 1099-DIV for dividends from stocks.

nodes.task_description: Enter the data from Form 1099-DIV, distinguishing between ordinary and qualified dividends.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs the dividend amounts into the tax software.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the tax on qualified dividends at the preferential capital gains rates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the qualified dividends are taxed correctly.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the total dividend income is correctly reported on the final return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the accuracy of the final tax calculation.
